content.question: Is Hungary's aggregate SEN/BTMN identification growth statistically large, continuous, and distinct from teacher perception or cohort-specific effects, or is growth concentrated in particular diagnostic sub-categories and geographies?
content.reduction_path: Obtain comprehensive administrative time-series (KSH, Hungarian Ministry of Education) covering 2010-2024 SEN/BTMN rolls by diagnostic category, grade, county, and ethnicity; compare against national enrollment trends and demographic baselines to isolate genuine growth.
